case_title: BARBOSA, WARNI VS JACINTO, VIEIRA CARLOS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY BARBOSA, WARNI AS TO DEFENDANT JACINTO, VIEIRA CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARBOSA, WARNI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACINTO, VIEIRA CARLOS $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,820.00, THE COURT ORDERS THE PURCHASE AGREEMENT FOR THE 1987 NISSAN TO BE RESCINDED WITHIN 15 DAYS OF THE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
OF THE MAILING OF JUDGMENT. PLFT SHALL RETURN THE VEHICLE TO DEFT. AND DEFT TO RE-IMBURSE PLFT THE $1800 PURCHASE PRICE. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED.
